access_note: The /community URL (https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCODHrzPMGbNv67e84WDZhQQ/community) returned 'Cette Communauté n'est pas disponible' (This Community is not available) -- likely a locale/routing quirk since the channel's own nav bar (seen on /about) does list a 'Posts' tab. posts_last_30d.text_excerpt: We are launching something new: Roots. It starts with a newsletter, packed with awesome and weird stories (like why there is barely any Wendy's in Europe). And because you're early, you'll receive a printable monitor freebie when you sign up: https://roots.watchfern.com/
on the real, the next hacker story is an all-time classic :)
Thank you for 5 million subscribers. We have so much amazing content planned for the rest of the year, hope you guys will enjoy :) - David, Jonas & the team

image_plus_text.note: Comment-reply counts for the 4 in-window posts were 241, 445, 464, and 625 respectively (order matches posts_last_30d above). All 4 posts attach a still image (thumbnail/graphic), none are pure polls or pure text despite YouTube's poll UI wrapper being present on the DOM for every post type.

note: 4 posts landed inside the last 30 days (2026-06-01 through 2026-07-01), roughly one every 7-8 days, tracking closely with the video-upload cadence. Content mix: 1 new-product/newsletter announcement (Roots), 1 teaser/hype post for an upcoming video, 1 milestone/thank-you post (5M subscribers, signed by name -- 'David, Jonas & the team'), 1 cross-promotion/collab shoutout tied to a recent video's investigative partner. No true multiple-choice polls were used in this window despite the poll-capable post renderer wrapping every entry. The 5M-subscriber milestone post is the highest-engagement item (16k likes) and is also the only post with an on-record human signature, a useful data point for community-manager voice matching.
